mapper.sql: id, code, name, platform_code, car_line_code, model_code, source, external_ref_id, external_version, last_sync_time, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_mdm_variant ( id, code, name, platform_code, car_line_code, model_code, source, external_ref_id, external_version, last_sync_time, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{code}, #{name}, #{platformCode}, #{carLineCode}, #{modelCode}, #{source}, #{externalRefId}, #{externalVersion}, #{lastSyncTime}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_mdm_variant SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, platform_code = #{platformCode}, car_line_code = #{carLineCode}, model_code = #{modelCode}, source = #{source}, external_ref_id = #{externalRefId}, external_version = #{externalVersion}, last_sync_time = #{lastSyncTime}, description = #{description}, modify_by = #{modifyBy}, modify_time = now(), row_version = row_version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND row_valid = 1

UPDATE tb_mdm_variant SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, platform_code = #{platformCode}, car_line_code = #{carLineCode}, model_code = #{modelCode}, source = #{source}, external_ref_id = #{externalRefId}, external_version = #{externalVersion}, last_sync_time = #{lastSyncTime}, description = #{description}, modify_by = #{modifyBy}, modify_time = now(), row_version = row_version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND row_valid = 1
